entry.title: Save Point
entry.summary:
Author: TheThirdChild

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 76,760Chapters: 23/?Kudos: 224

Summary: Stiles is determined to give Derek the perfect anniversary gift—the kind that proves he truly sees him. That somehow resulted in time travel and a surprise encounter with the Hale Pack pre-everything. Now he has to gather insight, avoid suspicion, and absolutely not rewrite history. Derek wanted something meaningful, but this might be too meaningful. Perfect gift status: pending.

entry.title: Unusual Markings
entry.summary:
Author: DaoOfGay

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,933Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 21

Summary: Everyone in the world has words upon their skin that will be the first words their soulmate will ever say to them. Everyone except Derek Hale. It's okay, he has grown used to the pitying looks when he tells people, so he stopped telling them. He went on with his life, but then somebody does something mean to his sister and goes after the guy responsible for it. Said guy had a white board on hand that he started trying to write on as Derek went on his rant, the frustrations of the day flooding out of him- he did feel a bit bad about cussing out the guy because his hands were shaking, but what he wrote on his sister's cup was not to be forgiven. Once he curses out the guy, he leaves. Hours later, in the shower after the long day he had, is when he notices the words that had appeared on his skin. Drawn in squilly, nervous lines, like those of somebody who was writing with shaky hands.

entry.title: (If Your Body Matches) What Your Eyes Can Do
entry.summary:
Author: Definitively_Different_Drivel

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,892Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 15

Summary: Stiles licked his lips in anticipation. Derek's eyes tracked the movement for just a moment then he cursed; the car swerved. Stiles gripped the sumptuous interior while the car righted itself beneath Derek's capable hands. The vehicle screeched to a halt in front of a tall, forbidding bit of architecture but Stiles didn't care. He was too distracted by the hand palming his crotch, by the face filling his field of view, by the lips pressing in against his, raging, ravenous.Just unabashedly horny sex as a followup to my Paralyzer ficlet, (I Seem To Be) Struck By You. You'll probably wanna read that one first.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: a problem that doesn't want to be solved
entry.summary:
Author: wishingonalightningbolt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 58,173Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 245

Summary: Derek is an executive at Hale Publishing. Stiles is his assistant—his assistant who's 23 years younger than him. So Derek really shouldn't...notice him. The way that he does. -0- Stiles is attractive. Derek knows that. He’s not blind. Sometimes, not often, Derek finds himself—looking. Admiring. Stiles is tall and fit, broad shoulders that taper to a trim waist, an ass that Derek shouldn’t be checking out as often as he does, firm and high. Derek isn’t ignorant to his own fluid sexuality. He used to fuck men, back in the day, when he was twenty and single and easy. But then he was with Jennifer, and since the divorce it’s just seemed…less complicated. To date women. But he likes men—aesthetically. Sexually. He likes Stiles more than he should. And it’s weird not because he’s a man but because Derek has literally never had this problem before. He’s never been attracted to one of his assistants, ever. Then again, none of his assistants have been anything like Stiles.

entry.title: Pack Scent
entry.summary:
Author: theauthoress

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,839Chapters: 11/12Kudos: 1,422

Summary: “What’s going on?”Scott made a strange, whiny noise at the back of his throat that made him sound a little like a kicked puppy. “Your scent.” He pulled on Stiles’s hoodie until their noses were practically touching.“Scott, buddy, you’re going to have to be more specific.” Stiles rubbed a circle on the back of Scott’s hand with his thumb. “You know I don’t have werewolf senses.”“You smell like… like…” Scott fumbled for words, his brow furrowed deeply. His eyes started to look a little wet, and that was something Stiles could not deal with.“Hey, hey, it’s okay. I’m okay. Just tell me what’s wrong and we’ll fix it. I’ll—I dunno—shower really good, I promise.”“You smell like something claimed you,” Scott finally said in a horrified whisper.

entry.title: A Fragile Thing
entry.summary:
Author: OyasumiPunPun

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 43,426Chapters: 7/10Kudos: 42

Summary: Derek Hale wanders into a forgotten corner of the city one rainy night, drawn by the pull of cyber-jazz from a hidden stairwell. Inside an underground gallery, one painting stops him cold—and then the artist does.Stiles Stilinski, with amber eyes, turpentine-stained hands, and an unsettling way of seeing right through people, offers something Derek has never allowed himself to want.One encounter. One fragile thing.And the carefully constructed life he’s trapped in—marriage, family, name—begins to crack.

entry.title: The Horrors Persist But So Do The Rom-Coms
entry.summary:
Author: anarchycox

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,463Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 28

Summary: Two things can be true, and can happen at once. Monsters are real and need to be dealt with, and people are going to have sex and fall in love. Chapter 1: A rom com of Melissa getting her groove back, while the main cast deal with a rather gooey monster of the week.Chapter 2: Our main cast deals with a rather unexpected monster of the week while romance happens in the background.

entry.title: The Gajos Audit
entry.summary:
Author: Siphiwe7173

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,389Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 19

Summary: Genim Stilinski-Gajos is a hidden powerhouse—a High Spark and heir to a decimated Polish Alpha lineage. At sixteen, he possesses a 290 IQ, ADHD, and a clinical mind that has spent months tracking the predatory grooming of Derek Hale by Kate Argent. While 15-year-old Scott McCall is blinded by his own teenage drama, Genim prepares for a war the Earth itself has predicted. On the night of the Hale House fire, Genim steps out of the shadows to save the pack, strip the druid Deaton of his power, and dismantle the Alpha Pack. Alongside his destined partner, Derek, Genim builds a sovereign territory, auditing his enemies out of existence.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: A Flower Made Of Iron
entry.summary:
Author: XOLissy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,838,368Chapters: 50/?Kudos: 69

Summary: Eden Parker has learned how to survive by staying soft in a world that punishes it. Adopted young, raised in the quiet fractures of Mystic Falls, and carrying truths no one else can see, Eden moves through life balancing grief, loyalty, and a dangerous kind of hope. He loves deeply. He trusts carefully. And he has no idea how many forces—human and otherwise—are already watching him. When new friendships form, old wounds reopen, and the supernatural begins to bleed into the ordinary, Eden finds himself at the center of something far larger than a high-school existence should allow. Monsters lurk in forests and shadows. Love arrives when it shouldn’t. Protection becomes complicated. And the past—buried, sealed, and forgotten—refuses to stay quiet. Some bonds are chosen. Some are fated. And some are forged in pain, blood, and devotion. Disclaimer: I do not own the Vampire Diaries, Supernatural, Teen Wolf, Smallville, or The Originals. I do not own any of the characters besides Eden Parker and Ben Monroe. All rights reserved to the writers.

entry.title: Straight Until My Ass
entry.summary:
Author: notyourtipicalauthor

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,749Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 56

Summary: Derek Hale never expected his freshman year in the frat house to turn into this: watching his childhood crush—once a skinny, awkward Stiles Stilinski—transform into the biggest, cockiest hung stud on the team, swinging that monster dick at every party and railing sorority girls like it was his job. Months of stolen glimpses through cracked doors, of thick freckled ass flexing while pounding blondes into the mattress, finally push Derek past the point of no return. He wants it. He wants Stiles to give him that, to bend him over, stretch him wide, and breed him until he's dripping and ruined. Basically, Derek goes from secret hallway voyeur to Stiles’ eager, cum-stuffed boytoy in one filthy night—and neither of them wants it to stop afterwards.

entry.title: For the Moon Goddess
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 67,220Chapters: 38/42Kudos: 128

Summary: Stiles is a new novice at the Beacon Hills Temple of the Moon Goddess, where the priests have forsworn all women and have ritual sex to make seminal offerings to their deity. In an AU where a moon cult is the dominant religion in an alternate fantasy-type world, Stiles navigates friendship, love, and a confusing priesthood that has way too many rules about sex for basically being Sex University.A lot of other pairings along the way, but from the beginning, this story is about how we get to Sterek.

entry.title: forget-me-not
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,456Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 28

Summary: It’s just Scott, but he hasn’t seen him in months, and he was already worried that his friend was pulling away from him; they’ve both been so busy with college and work. But the one time they’re both in town, and Scott can’t get it together to text him back? Stiles’ hands go to cover his face with exasperation before he can think, and he yelps when onion fumes seep into his eyes immediately. Saltwater drips down his pink cheeks, and he can’t stop it, this time. Derek goes to him at once, pulling his hands away from his face and into his own, squeezing tightly. He kisses Stiles’ forehead, the press of his lips staying for a long beat while Stiles pulls himself together.

entry.title: The Voyeur
entry.summary:
Author: Sodomitical_Tales

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 69,989Chapters: 25/39Kudos: 36

Summary: Stiles never meant to use his binoculars for anything but the force of good, but that’s probably how a lot of villains start out. The road to Hell and all that. But honestly, if the Universe didn’t want him to spy on his neighbours, it would have told Hottie McScowlface across the yard to buy a set of curtains when he first moved in.Or to work out with clothes on.Or to take his weekly conquests to another apartment for sexy times - one with curtains or without any windows at all. Thank God, it didn't.

entry.title: Have You Tried Not Being An Asshole?
entry.summary:
Author: Definitively_Different_Drivel

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,986Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 118

Summary: "Hello, this is Stiles with Open Door installer support, who am I speaking with and how can I help you?" he rattled off, lightning-fast. Fast or not, it still counted as asking for their name for QA purposes. "Derek." He rattled off customer information, then gave the most non-answer ever. "Door's not working." Stiles paused, pondering. Sounds like Peter found some poor schmucks to act as employees again. He wondered how long the new batch would last. Stiles braced himself for newbitude. Derek was gonna learn some fuckin things. "What have you tried so far?"In which Stiles is an access control tech support rep, Derek is an on-site tech dealing with nightmare installs, and Peter is a condescending dick.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

  • I don't think it's out of character for him even if I love Peter

  • Brief mention of magical Stiles
